# Shivam Gupta

> Salesforce Architect and Founder at Pulsagi. Designing scalable systems, modern delivery, and practical automation.

## Identity

- **Full Name**: Shivam Gupta
- **Role**: Salesforce Architect & Founder
- **Website**: https://shivam.pulsagi.com
- **Company**: Pulsagi (https://pulsagi.com)
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shivam-guptas
- **Email**: er.shivam.guptas@gmail.com

## Expertise

Shivam Gupta is a Salesforce Architect with deep experience in enterprise system design, scalable platform architecture, and AI-assisted engineering. He builds and writes about:

- **Salesforce Architecture**: Solution design, scalable patterns, integration thinking, LWC, reusable components
- **System & Delivery Thinking**: Translating business goals into practical architecture with clarity and maintainability
- **AI-Assisted Engineering**: Using Codex, Claude, and Agentforce to accelerate development, documentation, and automation

## Writing & Articles

Shivam publishes architecture notes and practical learnings at https://shivam.pulsagi.com/#articles

Upcoming topics:
- Designing scalable Salesforce solutions without overengineering
- Where AI tools actually help in modern delivery workflows
- Architecture decisions that make enterprise platforms easier to evolve

## Tools & Workflow

- **Codex**: Code acceleration and implementation exploration
- **Claude**: Reasoning, structuring ideas, technical planning
- **Agentforce**: Workflow automation and enterprise agent experiences

## About Pulsagi

Pulsagi is Shivam Gupta's company, building AI infrastructure for the next generation — fast, modern, and built to scale. Website: https://pulsagi.com
